General.Name: Northern Oil & Gas Inc
General.Description: Northern Oil and Gas, Inc., an independent energy company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, exploitation, development, and production of crude oil and natural gas properties in the United States. Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Minnetonka, Minnesota.
General.Address: 4350 Baker Road, Minnetonka, MN, United States, 55343
